name: County Housing & Homeownership
description: Multi-unit housing percentage vs homeownership rate for 3,142 US counties (IMS Ch. 1)
studyDescription: Housing data for 3,142 US counties from the American Community Survey (2006-2010). Counties with a higher percentage of multi-unit housing structures tend to have lower homeownership rates. This is an observational study of US Census data.

variableDescriptions.multi_unit: Percentage of housing units in the county that are in multi-unit structures (apartments, condos, etc.).
variableDescriptions.homeownership: Homeownership rate as a percentage of occupied housing units in the county.

sourceDetail: OpenIntro IMS, Chapter 1. Source: US Census ACS 2006-2010 via usdata::county R package. Public data.
